/usr/bin/ar qc liblib3ds.a CMakeFiles/lib3ds.dir/atmosphere.c.o CMakeFiles/lib3ds.dir/background.c.o CMakeFiles/lib3ds.dir/camera.c.o CMakeFiles/lib3ds.dir/chunk.c.o CMakeFiles/lib3ds.dir/ease.c.o CMakeFiles/lib3ds.dir/file.c.o CMakeFiles/lib3ds.dir/float.c.o CMakeFiles/lib3ds.dir/io.c.o CMakeFiles/lib3ds.dir/light.c.o CMakeFiles/lib3ds.dir/material.c.o CMakeFiles/lib3ds.dir/matrix.c.o CMakeFiles/lib3ds.dir/mesh.c.o CMakeFiles/lib3ds.dir/node.c.o CMakeFiles/lib3ds.dir/quat.c.o CMakeFiles/lib3ds.dir/shadow.c.o CMakeFiles/lib3ds.dir/tcb.c.o CMakeFiles/lib3ds.dir/tracks.c.o CMakeFiles/lib3ds.dir/vector.c.o CMakeFiles/lib3ds.dir/viewport.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liblib3ds.a
